# Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP)

> The Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) is a solution for enabling gen AI agents to make payments on behalf of users, safely, securely, and in a decentralized and privacy protecting manner. This protocol is a part of the broader ecosystem, which includes agentic protocols like A2A and MCP, and encompasses the global nature of payments.


## Specification

- [Overview](http://ucp.dev/draft/specification/overview/index.md)

## Message Signatures

- [Signatures](http://ucp.dev/draft/specification/signatures/index.md)

## Checkout Capability

- [Overview](http://ucp.dev/draft/specification/checkout/index.md)
- [REST](http://ucp.dev/draft/specification/checkout-rest/index.md)
- [MCP](http://ucp.dev/draft/specification/checkout-mcp/index.md)
- [A2A](http://ucp.dev/draft/specification/checkout-a2a/index.md)
- [Embedded protocol](http://ucp.dev/draft/specification/embedded-protocol/index.md)
- [Embedded](http://ucp.dev/draft/specification/embedded-checkout/index.md)
- [AP2 Mandates Extension](http://ucp.dev/draft/specification/ap2-mandates/index.md)
- [Buyer Consent Extension](http://ucp.dev/draft/specification/buyer-consent/index.md)
- [Discounts Extension](http://ucp.dev/draft/specification/discount/index.md)
- [Fulfillment Extension](http://ucp.dev/draft/specification/fulfillment/index.md)
